tax_filing.title: Quarterly GSTR-1/3B + annual return + statutory audit
tax_filing.summary: Quarterly GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B; annual GSTR-9; mandatory statutory audit for all companies (Companies Act).

vat_gst.title: GST e-invoicing — IRP portal real-time, threshold ₹5 Cr
vat_gst.summary: B2B e-invoicing via IRP mandatory for taxpayers with aggregate turnover >₹5 Cr (since Aug 2023); JSON schema, real-time clearance. Multi-rate 5%/12%/18%/28%.

e_invoicing.title: Mandatory GST e-invoicing via IRP
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory IRP portal real-time clearance; QR + IRN.

payroll.title: PF (12%+12%) + ESI + multi-state professional tax
payroll.summary: HIGH (multi-state) complexity: Provident Fund 12%+12%, ESI, professional tax varies by state.

local_gaap.title: Ind AS (IFRS-converged with carve-outs)
local_gaap.summary: Ind AS for companies above thresholds; IFRS-converged with India-specific carve-outs.

banking_payments.title: UPI dominant for real-time payments
banking_payments.summary: Unified Payments Interface dominates Indian retail payments — 14B+ monthly transactions.

banking_payments.title: Account Aggregator framework
banking_payments.summary: RBI Account Aggregator framework — open banking equivalent for consented financial data sharing.
